prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. prop (mug_red_v1): state: steaming, visually consistent. 林澈走近餐桌，视线锁定红杯, 他伸手试探杯壁温度，蒸汽袅袅, 林澈皱眉，后退一步. Narration: "桌上有一只红杯，杯沿还冒着热气。那不是他的杯子。". 林澈 says: "谁来过我家？". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of red ceramic mug on wooden table, steam rising, dim kitchen background, young man's hand reaching toward mug, shallow depth of field, warm light on mug, cool shadows, suspense. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
